summary: Tested Session Live content creation with meeting_link and marketplace flows. Backend APIs work correctly - session content with meeting_link is saved and retrieved properly. Frontend UI shows the 'Lien de réunion' field after expo restart.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly saves meeting_link in content_data when creating Session content
confirm-purchase API correctly extracts meeting_links from session contents and calls send_session_access_email
Frontend catalog.tsx has the 'Lien de réunion' field with proper placeholder and helper text
Email template in send_session_access_email properly formats meeting links with 'Rejoindre la session' button

success_rate.backend: 100% - 11 passed, 1 skipped (confirm-purchase skipped due to mocked Stripe)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - Session Live form with meeting_link field renders correctly

seed_data_creation: Created test Session Live content and Bundle offer via API tests (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: 1) Pro can create Session Live content with meeting_link, 2) meeting_link is saved in content_data, 3) Offers with sessions can be created and published, 4) Marketplace shows published offers, 5) Frontend 'Lien de réunion' field is present in Session Live form with zoom.us placeholder and helper text. Note: Stripe payment is mocked so confirm-purchase flow needs manual DB entry for full testing. Expo restart was needed for frontend changes to take effect.

features_tested.feature: Pro creates Session Live content with meeting_link
features_tested.details: POST /api/pro/content-library with content_type='session' and content_data.meeting_link saves correctly
POST /api/pro/offers with included_content_ids containing session content works correctly
GET /api/marketplace/offers returns published offers with correct structure
POST /api/marketplace/confirm-purchase requires valid purchase_id from Stripe flow (mocked)
success.tsx correctly calls POST /api/marketplace/confirm-purchase/{purchase_id} and displays results

features_tested.feature: Frontend Session Live form shows 'Lien de réunion'
features_tested.details: catalog.tsx has 'Lien de réunion (Zoom, Meet, Teams)' field with placeholder and helper text

mocked_apis.stripe_payment: Stripe checkout is mocked - purchase records need manual DB creation for confirm-purchase testing

rca_of_the_issue: Initial frontend test showed meeting_link field missing. After expo restart, the field appeared correctly. This was likely a Metro bundler caching issue where old code was being served. The source code in catalog.tsx was correct all along.
